consistency_check.level_progression: Level 14 feature is appropriate for a high-level class feature.
consistency_check.naming_convention: Name 'Vanish' fits the theme of stealth/disappearance.

quality_assessment.clarity: The description is clear and easily understandable.
quality_assessment.flavor: Strongly thematic for a master survivalist/tracker.
quality_assessment.balance_consideration: Bonus action Hide is very powerful at level 14, significantly boosting action economy for stealth. Immunity to nonmagical tracking is a significant utility upgrade.

feature_1.name: Bonus Action Hide
feature_1.effect: Allows the Hide action as a bonus action.
feature_1.mechanical_impact: High. Grants immediate stealth capability without sacrificing the main action, offering significant tactical advantage in combat or exploration.

feature_2.name: Tracking Immunity
feature_2.effect: Untrackable by nonmagical means unless the character chooses otherwise.
feature_2.mechanical_impact: High utility. Completely negates standard pursuit mechanics (e.g., survival checks for tracking) unless magic is involved.

suggested_improvements: None immediately necessary; the feature is powerful but appropriate for a Tier 4 class ability.
